title: gymnadenia habenarioides
intro: Gymnadenia habenarioides, also known as the autumn lady's tresses or autumnal lady's tresses orchid, is a type of flowering plant in the orchid family, characterized by its long, slender spikes of white flowers that bloom in the fall. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which have been shown to have various health benefits. The medicinal properties of Gymnadenia habenarioides have been found to have a positive effect on the immune system, as well as having antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, teas, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential health benefits and optimal preparation methods.
